text:
Barnsley F.C., association football club in Barnsley, England, also known as Barnsley St. Peter's, Barnsley FC, The Tykes, BFC, Barnsley Football Club, Barnsley, The Reds. Attributes include:

- league or competition: "EFL League One (start time: 2022)"
- Commons category: "Barnsley F.C."

- sport: "association football"
